raw_consumer_statement: I visited XXXX in XXXX. The cab company charged my card twice : Once for the correct amount of {$100.00}. There was a second charge for {$400.00}. They intentionally scammed me of that money. I opened a dispute and citi sent back saying it was a legitimate charge and closed the dispute. I called to get it reopened. Even though they said they would look into it, the case has not been reopened and still says customer is responsible for the charges.
